feed.title: AO3 - Tim Drake/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Tim Drake/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Robins: Robin's End
entry.summary:
Author: SpiderFan_33

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,339Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 5

Summary: Two months after Jason Todd shot Bruce Wayne dead in the bowels of the Batcave, the city is trying to find its balance again—but the Bat-Family is more fractured than ever. With Barbara Gordon leaving Gotham to build something new and Jason carving a brutal path through the city’s criminal underworld, the responsibility for holding the line falls to an uneasy partnership: Damian Wayne as Batman… and Tim Drake-Wayne as Robin. On the surface, they are still perfect together in the field—precise, ruthless, unstoppable. Off the rooftops, nothing is that simple. Grief and regret twists loyalty into something harder to recognize. And the secrets they’ve buried—about Bruce, about each other, about the lines they crossed trying to save what was already lost—are beginning to surface. As the city edges toward a new order and the past refuses to stay buried, Batman and Robin must decide what justice means in a world where the man who taught them is gone—and where the greatest threat to the Bat-Family might be the truth. The Robins: Robin’s End is the final chapter of The Robins saga—a story of grief, loyalty, love, betrayal, and the impossible legacy of the symbol called Robin.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,679Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Life on the Other Side
entry.summary:
Author: Akio_O

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,355Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 369

Summary: For Timothy Drake, obsession is far worse than compulsion.Compulsivity is action. Action can be taken and completed at any time, it’s mindless. It’s repetitive movement, expected and anticipated more often than not.Obsession is far worse. Obsession plagues the mind and overtakes rationality. It spins spiderwebs in the brain and warps your very being. It can spawn from the simplest thing and then spiral into an all encompassing essentiality.TLDR; Tim needs to know everything, Damian is hard to know and the world makes it impossible. Plus a stroll on the darker side of Gotham!

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,099Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 150

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.

entry.title: Just a ghost out of his grave
entry.summary:
Author: polybatcest

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,320Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 35

Summary: “Harm killed my brother,” Damian had said to Tim. “I hated him for it. So I killed him.” Her brother. She’d rarely acknowledged Tim as such before. She had, in fact, made it a point to tell him on more than one occasion that he was not and never would be Bruce’s son; was not and never would be her brother. Tim loved her. Tim hated her. He also—unfortunately, tragically, soul-crushingly—needed her help.

entry.title: I am selfish, I am broken, I am cruel
entry.summary:
Author: polybatcest

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,976Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 122

Summary: (Revised version! Reverse Robins + transfem Damian AU) 2008: Tim Drake—second Robin, superhero prodigy, and Damian Wayne's fifteen-year-old little brother—is murdered on a mission with Young Justice. 2016: Damian is woken from sleep by the fourth Robin, fifteen-year-old Jason Todd, screaming for help. When she bursts into his room, she's greeted by an assassin from the League with glowing green eyes and a grudge against Damian—a grudge that he intends to take out on Jason. Damian has to contend with Tim's anger over Damian's old cruelty, his loyalty to Ra's, and his hatred of Jason. And if she's unable to put the ghost of her greatest mistake to rest, Jason will pay with his life.

entry.summary:
Author: Whyyyyyyyyfcky

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,044Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 321

Summary: It was supposed to be a harmless wager. A joke. A moment to tease and move on. But something shifts. The air grows heavier, the silences longer. And somewhere in the shadows of the Batcave, under the weight of old fabric and older memories, a line is crossed—and nothing feels quite the same again.

entry.title: whisper in a dead man's ear
entry.summary:
Author: jay (tofupofu)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,280Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: “I know you put cameras in our bedroom.” Tim blinks awake, groggy and slow. “Wh-huh?” He sits, rubbing his eyes. His bedhead is truly atrocious, sticking up on one side. He’s not wearing a shirt, autopsy scar on full display, and it’s painfully obvious that he’s not firing on all cylinders yet. That's alright. Jon can wait.
